_MD013_comment: Disable hard line-length limit. Many docs are table-heavy or quote third-party text (Contributor Covenant) that we cannot reflow.
_MD033_comment: Allow common inline HTML used in issue templates and folded sections.
_MD024_comment: Allow duplicate headings as long as they're under different parents (e.g. multiple ## Examples sections).
_MD041_comment: Allow first-line content other than H1 — several docs lead with HTML comments or badges.
_MD036_comment: Allow emphasis-as-heading; we use **bold** for inline section titles inside lists.
_MD040_comment: Require fenced code blocks to declare a language for syntax highlighting.
_MD060_comment: Disable strict table-column-style — existing tables mix compact (`| a | b |`) and padded (`| a   | b   |`) layouts; one style across the repo isn't worth the diff churn.
_MD012_comment: Allow up to 2 consecutive blank lines (default 1). Lets sections breathe in long docs.
_MD004_comment: Per-file consistency for unordered-list bullet style. CHANGELOG.md uses '*' (release-please's conventional-changelog formatter); the rest of the repo uses '-'. Both are valid Markdown; each file is internally consistent. Setting 'consistent' explicitly overrides Codacy's stricter preset.
